---
title: "Monthly Surveillance Reports"
subtitle: "Notifiable Medical Conditions Surveillance System — National Monthly Summaries"
sidebar: monthly-reports
listing:
  id: reports-listing
  contents: posts
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  grid-columns: 3
  date-format: "MMMM YYYY"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
These reports summarise all notifications received by the **NMC Surveillance System (NMCSS)** for a given calendar month. Each report covers notification volumes, Category 1 & 2 conditions, provincial breakdown, data quality, and NMC App usage statistics.
:::

::: {#reports-listing}
:::

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="How to generate reports"}
**Single month:**

```r
# Edit REPORTING_MONTH and source:
source("monthly-reports/run_report.R")
```

**Last 12 months (pre-deployment):**

```r
source("monthly-reports/run_all_reports.R")
```

Then run `quarto render` — the HTML and Word files in `monthly-reports/rendered/` are copied into `_site/` automatically. A listing stub is created automatically in `monthly-reports/posts/` for each rendered month.
:::

---

## Report structure

Each monthly report covers:

| Section | Content |
|---|---|
| Introduction | Data export date, reporting month context |
| Highlights | Key notification counts, timeliness summary |
| Category 1 Conditions | Epitable, confirmed trends, epicurve |
| NMC Data Summary | Overall breakdown by category, province, back-capture |
| Category 1 — Detail | Condition-specific notification tables & CFR |
| Category 2 — Detail | Notification tables, trends |
| NMC App Statistics | Active users, notification types, newly registered users |
| Data Quality | Completeness, ID numbers, symptomatology, hospital forms, timeliness |
| Appendices | Back-capture analysis, IDSR table, full Category 1 epitable |

: {.striped .hover tbl-colwidths="[25,75]"}
